Archive Memory Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals 256000 physical damage to 3 random enemy units and stuns them for 1 sec. If the targets have less than 40% health left afterwards, the ring owner deals an extra 176000 pure damage to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Event:

Event date:

Sage bot code: RI213

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs

Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
